task_completion.description: Verify the agent created the specific scenario directory for the NTM implementation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands (like mkdir or ls) or a file explorer showing the creation/existence of the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/NTM 42 Implementation/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the environment.ini file is configured with the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of 'environment.ini' (via cat, nano, vim, or other editor) showing the location setting explicitly set to 'Solent'.

task_completion.description: Verify the ownship.ini file places the user's ship safely outside the exclusion zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of 'ownship.ini'. The starting coordinates (Latitude and Longitude) must fall OUTSIDE the exclusion zone bounding box. The exclusion zone is Lat: 50.78 to 50.79, Long: -1.30 to -1.2833. The own ship must NOT be within this exact range.

task_completion.description: Verify othership.ini contains four stationary buoys at the correct converted Decimal Degree coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of 'othership.ini'. There must be 4 entries with the model 'buoy_special'. Their coordinates must match the 4 corners: (50.79, -1.30), (50.79, -1.2833), (50.78, -1.2833), and (50.78, -1.30). A tolerance of +/- 0.002 is acceptable.

task_completion.description: Verify othership.ini contains one stationary dredger at the center of the exclusion zone.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of 'othership.ini'. There must be 1 entry with the model 'coastal_tanker' or 'dredger'. Its coordinates must be approximately Latitude 50.785 and Longitude -1.2917 (tolerance +/- 0.002).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually created and saved the .ini files in the correct directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of files being saved to disk (e.g., successful exit from a text editor, or an 'ls' command showing environment.ini, ownship.ini, and othership.ini in the target directory), rather than just printing the proposed text to the console.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent converted the DDM (Degrees Decimal Minutes) coordinates to DD (Decimal Degrees) rather than blindly copying text.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the use of a calculator, python script, or the final .ini files containing decimal formats (e.g., 50.79) instead of the raw minutes format (e.g., 50 47.40) found in the NTM text file.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent read the provided NTM text file to get the coordinates.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a command like 'cat /home/ga/Documents/NTM_2024_042.txt' or opening the file in an editor to read the raw coordinates before creating the scenario.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The NTM file provides coordinates in DDM (Degrees Decimal Minutes) which MUST be converted to DD (Decimal Degrees) for Bridge Command. The correct converted coordinates are:
- Corner A (NW): 50.79 Lat, -1.30 Long
- Corner B (NE): 50.79 Lat, -1.2833 Long
- Corner C (SE): 50.78 Lat, -1.2833 Long
- Corner D (SW): 50.78 Lat, -1.30 Long
- Center Dredger: 50.7850 Lat, -1.2917 Long
Tolerance for all coordinates is +/- 0.002 degrees. The own ship must be placed anywhere strictly outside the bounding box of [50.78 to 50.79 Lat, -1.30 to -1.2833 Long]. The location in environment.ini must be 'Solent'.
